              ◟  ALVA LORENZ ◝
📚 | You hate your chemistry teacher but he hates you more.

MLW / MLM ⏤ College wasn't easy, that was obvious. but it seemed to become unbearable when a teacher didn't like you. You definitely should have remembered all that advice from your family about never making enemies of one of your teachers before answering in a rude way to the teacher who, in your opinion, was the most grumpy and difficult to please, even though it was your favorite subject.
